rationale.R1.3: The section is dense with specific quantitative claims (38% average ECE reduction, 47% on ToolBench, Brier +0.12, <1.5pp success gap, ablation attribution to temperature recalibration). If the goal is soundness review, verifying that each claim is grounded in the reported experimental apparatus is load-bearing.
